aboutTeaser.title: More than a restaurant. A highway landmark.
aboutTeaser.subtitle: Since 2017, Aaradhya Grand has been serving pure veg food with fresh ingredients and masterful preparation — trusted by 7,900+ reviewers.

menuPreview.title: A taste of what awaits you.
menuPreview.subtitle: Some of our most loved dishes — explore the full menu for even more options.

galleryPreview.title: Royal ambience, warm lighting, and pure veg goodness.
galleryPreview.subtitle: Take a peek at our upscale interiors, signature dishes, and the welcoming atmosphere.

closingCta.title: Breakfast. Lunch. Dinner. All pure vegetarian.
closingCta.subtitle: Whether it's a morning idli, afternoon thali, or evening snack — we're here every day on NH-75, Kolar.
